calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Reyes Hunter, CSR#6576.

Lisa K. Padilla, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff PEAK REALTY GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.
Witness Jim Keighran sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant SARAH WILLIS.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows: The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 499 Marina Blvd. #106, San Francisco, 94123 San Francisco County.

Damages $11,700.00
Holdover damages $2307.22
Attorney's Fees $1,155.00
Costs $563.46
For a Total Judgment of $15,725.68

Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Peak Realty Group, Inc. is present. Represented by Jim Keighran.
Attorney Lisa K. Padilla for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sarah Willis is present.
Attorney Richard Roisman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of December 18, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
